title: Mobs Refreshed X Ghasts Galore!
description: This project adds compatibility between the Mobs Refreshed pack and the Ghasts Galore pack.
body:
As this pack is quite similar to it's predecessor, here is the original description: (with a few tweaks)

# Ghasts Galore
[Discord](https://discord.gg/DSQPNbDW7r)

Since the release of mineraft 1.21.6, I have been playing arround with the happy ghast, and its parts and components. (ghast, dryed ghast and ghastling)
And I've noticed something.
The textures repeat.
Over, and over, and over, again.
The same with the animations (but with the new fresh animations and mobs refreshed update not so much).
It get's boring, fast.

And I thought: what if I could make a ridiculous amount of textures for these lil guys.
So I dove into making texture, after texture, after texture, ghast, after ghast, after ghast, until I had around sixty. Plus squids because why not.

## This pack contains all of them!
Not only are the gills of the ghastlings diferent, but also the patterns of their skin, and the adults too! (including the sad ones)

Some of the types you may find are:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

0. Speckled skin pattern,
1. Striped skin pattern,
2. Ringed skin pattern,
3. Classic skin pattern,
4. Neon skin pattern, (black)
5. Classic gills,
6. Red gills,
7. Light blue gills,
8. Blue gills,
9. Deep blue gills,
10. Seafoam green gills,
11. Green gills,
12. Vibrant green gills,
13. Orange gills,
14. Yellow gills,
15. Purple gills,
16. Magenta gills,
17. Magenta gills, (neon)
18. Diamond gills, (neon)
19. Peridot gills, (neon)
20. Prurge-red gills, (neon)
21. Bio-mech, (a mossy skin based off my good friend Hayes-in-the-woods)
22. Rat mask, (somewhat of a reference to my inspiration in minecraft content creation: Doctor4t)
23. Classic ghast, (a bit of a tone change)
24. Drying,
25. Near-dryed,
26. Soul-gray.

</details>

### Requirements
This pack requires [fresh animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) to work, along with [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [ghasts galore](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-ghasts-galore), and (optional) [mobs refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mobs-refreshed).

To work, this pack must be activated/turned on/equiped/enabled AFTER the other packs.

### One last thing
If you like my packs: please consider supporting and/or donating to me on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal), 
My Ko-Fi supporters also get a say in what packs I make next.
It helps so much, and means a lot.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
